category.clay.title: Pottery
category.copper.title: Copper Age
category.bronze.title: Bronze Age

category.new_branch.title: Branch {0}
quest.legend.0.description: In your pocket: a scorched journal by a smith named Era. On the cover, a coal shaped like a star. “Find my path — find the last forge.”
quest.legend.1.description: First note: “Begin with wood. Sticks remember the wind.” Gather sticks — turn the first page.
quest.legend.2.description: “Grass dry as old letters.” Collect tinder. Era wrote by firelight.
quest.legend.3.description: “Fire is the only witness.” Stock firewood so the journal won’t shiver.
quest.legend.4.description: Your camp holds. Night is no longer master. A map bleeds through the page: stone → clay → copper…
quest.legend.5.description: “Flint cuts the dark.” Find flint — Era sharpened blades and thoughts alike.
quest.legend.6.description: “Clay listens to fire better than people.” Bring blue clay. Without it, metal is a fairy tale.
quest.legend.7.description: “Copper is the earth’s blood, if you know where it sleeps.” Gather nuggets. The journal warms in your hands.
quest.legend.8.description: First chapters complete. The path branches: metal ages, hunt, fields, and ruins.
quest.legend.9.description: Resin notes: “Conifers remember the storm.” Collect resin — glue for what iron cannot bind.
quest.legend.10.description: “Bees keep summer in comb.” Honey and wax — light when ore is scarce.
quest.legend.11.description: Among roots: a rusty gear. Era marked it with an ember star — “Shard of the Time Before.”
quest.legend.12.description: “Charcoal is the forge’s black sun.” Stock it. Iron will not wake without heat.
quest.legend.13.description: The legend thickens. You are no longer only surviving — you are following Era.
quest.legend.14.description: “When iron sings on the anvil, return to the gears.” Bring an iron ingot as a vow.
quest.legend.15.description: More gears from the ruins. Era believed that gathering them reveals the hum of “machines under the sky.”
quest.legend.16.description: The legend’s end is open. Steel, ruins, and the last forge wait for whoever finishes the journal.
quest.stone.0.description: Stone Age — Era’s first chapter. “Who cannot live by flint does not deserve steel.”
quest.stone.1.description: Gather sticks. Handles, torches and spears begin in the woods.
quest.stone.2.description: Stones for knapping. Strike stone on stone — Era’s first lesson.
quest.stone.3.description: Dry grass is the fire’s breath. Without it, flame stays a dream.
quest.stone.4.description: Flint is king among stones. Stock it while the land is kind.
quest.stone.5.description: Cattails by water. Tops for weaving; roots for hungry days.
quest.stone.6.description: Cattail roots feed the clever. “The marsh feeds those who look.”
quest.stone.7.description: Knapp a knife blade — the world’s first honest edge.
quest.stone.8.description: Finish a flint knife. Cut grass, meat, cord — and fear.
quest.stone.9.description: An axe. The forest becomes supply, not a wall.
quest.stone.10.description: A shovel. Clay, soil, beds — all wait for your strike.
quest.stone.11.description: A hoe. Even stone can promise a harvest.
quest.stone.12.description: A spear. Distance between you and teeth.
quest.stone.13.description: A club. When the spear is far, hard wood remains.
quest.stone.14.description: Stock firewood. Night loves those who keep an ember.
quest.stone.15.description: A hand basket. Pockets end before the road does.
quest.stone.16.description: Twine binds the path. Without thread, all unravels.
quest.stone.17.description: Stone Age sealed. Era would nod: “Now clay.”
quest.clay.0.description: Clay is chapter two. “Metal without a vessel is rain without a jug.”
quest.clay.1.description: Blue clay by water. Dig with patience — Era hated haste.
quest.clay.2.description: Red clay serves too. Different seams, different songs.
quest.clay.3.description: Fire clay for heat that shatters ordinary pots.
quest.clay.5.description: Raw cooking pots. Winter soups begin here.
quest.clay.6.description: Raw crocks. Stored food is a quiet army.
quest.clay.7.description: Raw crucibles. Without them copper never becomes an ingot.
quest.clay.8.description: A planter. Even smiths grew green by the door.
quest.clay.9.description: Firewood for the pit kiln — forge of pauper and genius.
quest.clay.10.description: Fired bowls. Fire grants them the right to hold food.
quest.clay.12.description: Fired crocks. Meals will outlast the road.
quest.clay.13.description: Fired crucibles. Open the door to copper.
quest.clay.14.description: A fired planter. A small garden by a great forge.
quest.clay.15.description: Charcoal for fierce heat. Ceramics love coal as metal does.
quest.clay.16.description: Pottery complete. Era scratched on a shard: “Next — the gleam.”
quest.copper.0.description: Copper Age. “The first metal that obeys the hands.”
quest.copper.1.description: Native copper. Gather along seams as Era followed dreams.
quest.copper.2.description: Charcoal for the melt. Heat must be long and fierce.
quest.copper.3.description: Copper ingots — hard currency of craft.
quest.copper.4.description: A copper hammer. True smithing begins with this strike.
quest.copper.5.description: A copper pick. Earth yields what flint could not take.
quest.copper.6.description: A prospecting pick. Era mapped ores like stars.
quest.copper.7.description: A copper axe. The forest yields faster.
quest.copper.8.description: A copper shovel. Clay and mines thank you.
quest.copper.9.description: A copper hoe. Fields beside a forge are wisdom, not weakness.
quest.copper.10.description: A copper knife. Sharper than stone, cleaner than rust.
quest.copper.11.description: A chisel. Fine work is still strength.
quest.copper.12.description: A saw. Planks as straight as journal lines.
quest.copper.13.description: A scythe. Harvest feeds a smith as well as ore.
quest.copper.14.description: Shears. Sheep and flax will not wait while you dig copper.
quest.copper.15.description: A copper anvil. The workshop’s heart beats steady.
quest.copper.16.description: A copper spear. Metal on a shaft — stone age is over.
quest.copper.17.description: Copper conquered. Journal: “Seek tin. Alloy outranks pride.”
quest.bronze.1.description: Tin ingots. Rarity that remakes an era.
quest.bronze.2.description: Copper for alloy. Bronze loves exact measure.
quest.bronze.3.description: Tin bronze. The anvil’s ring rises higher.
quest.bronze.4.description: A bronze hammer. Deeper strike, cleaner mark.
quest.bronze.5.description: A bronze pick. Veins that mocked copper fall silent.
quest.bronze.6.description: A bronze axe. The forest remembers your steps.
quest.bronze.7.description: A bronze saw. Homes grow from true planks.
quest.bronze.8.description: A bronze shovel. Deeper into clay and mine.
quest.bronze.9.description: A bronze knife. For hide, food and fine work.
quest.bronze.10.description: A bronze chisel. Patterns and the locks of machines.
quest.bronze.11.description: A bronze scythe. Fields will not wait on the forge.
quest.bronze.12.description: A bronze prospecting pick. Era: “Listen to stone — it rarely lies.”
quest.bronze.13.description: A bronze anvil. Heavy as a vow.
quest.bronze.14.description: A bronze spear. Hunt and border-watch.
quest.bronze.15.description: Bronze complete. Next — iron’s black heat.
quest.iron.0.description: Iron Age. “Do not cast — smith. Iron is born of persistence.”
quest.iron.1.description: Much charcoal. The bloomery is always hungry.
quest.iron.2.description: More firewood — charcoal does not fall from the sky.
quest.iron.3.description: Iron blooms. Raw metal of Era’s age.
quest.iron.4.description: Iron ingots. Hammer blooms into tomorrow’s obedience.
quest.iron.5.description: An iron hammer. The forge sounds different.
quest.iron.6.description: An iron pick. The deep opens its mouth.
quest.iron.7.description: An iron axe. The forest bows.
quest.iron.8.description: An iron saw. Workshops and walls rise fast.
quest.iron.9.description: An iron shovel. Mines and clay cannot close in time.
quest.iron.10.description: An iron scythe. Harvest for a great forge.
quest.iron.11.description: An iron chisel. Precision after power.
quest.iron.12.description: An iron knife. Long service if cared for.
quest.iron.13.description: An iron prospecting pick. The map of depths grows.
quest.iron.14.description: Iron shears. Flock and flax serve the settlement.
quest.iron.15.description: An iron anvil. Heart of Era’s great forge.
quest.iron.16.description: An iron spear. Guard at the threshold of ruins.
quest.iron.17.description: Iron is yours. The journal whispers: “Steel is the emberstar at midnight.”
quest.steel.0.description: Steel Age — Era’s finale. “Whoever reaches here hears the forge under the sky.”
quest.steel.3.description: More charcoal. Nights at the anvil run long.
quest.steel.4.description: Steel ingots. Peak of survival metallurgy.
quest.steel.5.description: A steel hammer. A strike whose echo lives in the walls.
quest.steel.6.description: A steel pick. Breaks what broke others.
quest.steel.7.description: A steel axe. Forest is only material.
quest.steel.8.description: A steel saw. Perfect planks for the last workshop.
quest.steel.9.description: A steel chisel. Finesse at the edge of power.
quest.steel.10.description: A steel knife. A blade that remembers every earlier one.
quest.steel.11.description: A steel scythe. Fields for a whole settlement.
quest.steel.12.description: A steel prospecting pick. You read stone like a journal.
quest.steel.13.description: A steel anvil. The throne Era wrote of.
quest.steel.14.description: A steel spear — and in it, a glint of rusty ruin-gears.
quest.steel.15.description: Steel Age conquered. The emberstar burns in your forge. The legend closes — and opens again in wanderings.
quest.hunting.0.description: Hunting. “A smith who cannot take food only forges hunger.”
quest.hunting.1.description: A flint spear. First treaty with distance.
quest.hunting.2.description: Bones — glue, points, and memory of beasts.
quest.hunting.3.description: Fat. Light, frying, tanning — pale blood of the kill.
quest.hunting.4.description: Feathers. Arrows without them are sticks.
quest.hunting.5.description: Raw meat. Do not eat it so — fire waits.
quest.hunting.6.description: Cooked meat. Satiety writes steady journal lines.
quest.hunting.7.description: Bushmeat. The woods share if you are careful.
quest.hunting.8.description: Raw hides. Start of leather and warmth.
quest.hunting.9.description: Scraped hides. Patience of the tannery.
quest.hunting.11.description: A simple bow. Era’s quiet hunt.
quest.hunting.13.description: A leather helm. The head is a tool too.
quest.hunting.15.description: Raw fish. The river feeds wanderers.
quest.hunting.16.description: Smoked fish. Trail rations without haste.
quest.hunting.17.description: Hunter ready. Era: “Meat on the table steadies metal in the hand.”
quest.farming.4.description: Onion. Sharp comfort for long soups.
quest.farming.6.description: Spelt harvest. The quern is calling.
quest.farming.7.description: Rye harvest. Another bread, another winter.
quest.farming.9.description: Carrots from the beds. Color on the table.
quest.farming.10.description: Onions from the beds. Tears are part of harvest.
quest.farming.11.description: Turnips from the beds. Soil answers care.
quest.farming.13.description: Eggs. The yard lives beside the field.
quest.farming.14.description: Flour. Without it bread is only a dream.
quest.farming.15.description: A quern. Stone that feeds better than a pick.
quest.farming.16.description: Fields ready. Era: “A fed smith strikes truer.”
quest.crafts.0.description: Home crafts. “A forge without a house is a fire in a field.”
quest.crafts.1.description: Flax fiber. Yarn of the path.
quest.crafts.2.description: Twine. Binding force of a settlement.
quest.crafts.3.description: Cloth. Clothes and sails of comfort.
quest.crafts.7.description: Spelt bread. A smell worth living for.
quest.crafts.8.description: Rye bread. Another crust, same strength.
quest.crafts.9.description: Planks. Walls grow from straight lines.
quest.crafts.11.description: Cobble. A floor unafraid of boots.
quest.crafts.12.description: Fire bricks. Kilns and forges love them.
quest.crafts.13.description: Red bricks. Color of a home.
quest.crafts.15.description: Candles. Night pages of the journal.
quest.crafts.16.description: Butter. For bread and evening quiet.
quest.crafts.17.description: Home ready. Era would sit at the table and smile.
quest.explore.0.description: Wanderings. The journal’s last pages speak of ruins and “machines under the sky.”
quest.explore.1.description: Blueberries by the trail. Sweetness on a wanderer’s tongue.
quest.explore.2.description: Mixed fruit. The forest rewrites the menu daily.
quest.explore.3.description: Horsetail. Heals and reminds: nature is older than the forge.
quest.explore.4.description: Catmint. A scent that calms after the mine.
quest.explore.5.description: Deep-woods resin. Trees remember Era’s storm.
quest.explore.6.description: Honeycomb. Wild honey — gold without a mine.
quest.explore.7.description: Wax. Light for catacombs and long roads.
quest.explore.8.description: Rusty gears. Shards of the Time Before — as in the Legend.
quest.explore.9.description: More gears. Era laid them in an ember-star circle.
quest.explore.10.description: Gold nuggets. Rarity glittering in ruin dust.
quest.explore.11.description: Silver. Cold gleam of old halls.
quest.explore.13.description: A temporal gear. Heart of the legend. Era reached here — and vanished into the hum.
quest.explore.14.description: Wanderings never end. The emberstar burns in you: smith, sow, walk on.

modal.goals_hint.obtain: Have the items (they are not taken)
